title: Timothée Chalamet Smashes All-Time Box Office Record For A24 With New Golden Globe Winning Movie
text: Marty Supreme Box Office Performance. Projected Earnings: As of the MLK Jr. Day weekend (its fifth weekend in theaters), Marty Supreme was projected to earn a 4-day total of $7 million at the domestic box office, bringing its cumulative total to $81.1 million. Record Broken: The film surpassed a major milestone by becoming A24's highest-grossing movie domestically. It exceeded the previous record holder, the 2022 Best Picture winner Everything Everywhere All At Once, which had earned $77.1 million. Budget Consideration: Despite this success, the film faced a reported $70 million production budget—A24's most expensive film to date—placing its estimated break-even point around $175 million at the theatrical box office. The Golden Globe win for Timothée Chalamet added momentum to the film's continued box office performance, cementing its position as a major commercial success for the studio.
